---

```plain
#!/usr/bin/python
#coding:utf-8
import codecs
import gmpy2,binascii,libnum,time

e=3
res=0
c=int('',16)
print time.asctime()
def sss(n):
    s = hex(n)[2:]
    if len(s) % 2 != 0:
            s = "0" + s
    return str(codecs.decode(s, 'hex'))
for i in xrange(200000000):
    if gmpy2.iroot(c+n*i,3)[1]==1:
        res=gmpy2.iroot(c+n*i,3)[0]
        print i,res
        print sss(res)
        print time.asctime()
        break
```
